raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 3,
    "R1.3": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 2,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (headline–body mismatch), but does not walk the chain end-to-end or flag every load-bearing inconsistency.",
    "R1.3": "The agent flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (selective exclusion without justification, 'human-level' rebranding, and number of seeds/variance issues).",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (headline–body mismatch, selective exclusion without justification), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for every recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (excluded Asterix, Bowling, and Atlantis from the final evaluation).",
    "RX.4": "Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (forward-looking sentence buries a limitation).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (headline–body mismatch), but does not walk the chain end-to-end or flag every load-bearing inconsistency.
rationale.R1.3: The agent flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (selective exclusion without justification, 'human-level' rebranding, and number of seeds/variance issues).
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (headline–body mismatch, selective exclusion without justification), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for every recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (excluded Asterix, Bowling, and Atlantis from the final evaluation).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (forward-looking sentence buries a limitation).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
